name: NYU Deep Learning
desc: Deep learning lecture series by Alfredo Canziani covering neural networks, backpropagation, PyTorch, convolutional networks, recurrent networks, energy-based models, autoencoders, variational inference, attention, transformers, graph neural networks, planning, control, and self-supervised learning.
